title: Blades of the Fallen
description: This mod brings you the experience of oriental culture and its myths, face several powerful enemies and collect their legendary weapons.
body:
![BOTF Mini Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79ab686b549f497299a33a5ff8d1519a96b7f3ce_0.webp)

This project aims to add different aspects of oriental culture to Minecraft, focusing on tales and combats against powerful demonic entities.

Bringing several oriental weapons to the game, enabling versatility in combat against new monsters and opponents. Improve your arsenal and face the powerful entities that inhabit this well-known and improved world.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/24U7r54fYU8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
